query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white silhouette profile of a horse or donkey against a completely dark background. Bright backlighting traces a thin rim of light along the animal's jaw, throat, mane, and ear, illuminating fine individual hairs along the edges. The subject faces right with its head slightly raised. A small copyright watermark appears in the lower left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white silhouette profile of a horse or donkey rendered through deliberate exposure extremes that crush the subject into near-total darkness, leaving facial features and body surfaces in unrecoverable shadow. Bright backlighting traces a thin rim of light along the jaw, throat, mane, and ear against a pitch-black background, illuminating fine individual hairs while the rest of the form dissolves into graphic abstraction. A small copyright watermark appears in the lower left corner.
